mapper.insert: insert into announcements (title, content, publisher, publisher_role, publish_time, valid_from, valid_to, target_type, target_value, priority, attachments, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisher}, #{publisherRole}, #{publishTime}, #{validFrom}, #{validTo}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue}, #{priority}, #{attachments}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, COALESCE(read_counts.read_count, 0) as read_count FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT announcement_id, COUNT(*) as read_count FROM announcement_read_records GROUP BY announcement_id ) read_counts ON a.id = read_counts.announcement_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update announcements
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
publisher = #{publisher},
publisher_role = #{publisherRole},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
valid_from = #{validFrom},
valid_to = #{validTo},
target_type = #{targetType},
target_value = #{targetValue},
priority = #{priority},
attachments = #{attachments},
status = #{status},
update_time = NOW()
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, COALESCE(read_counts.read_count, 0) as read_count FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT announcement_id, COUNT(*) as read_count FROM announcement_read_records GROUP BY announcement_id ) read_counts ON a.id = read_counts.announcement_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.priority = 'important' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, COALESCE(read_counts.read_count, 0) as read_count FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT announcement_id, COUNT(*) as read_count FROM announcement_read_records GROUP BY announcement_id ) read_counts ON a.id = read_counts.announcement_id
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT(#{title}, '%')
AND a.status = #{status}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.priority = 'important' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM announcements WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM announcements WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_read_records r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id), 0) as read_count, CASE WHEN EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM announcement_read_records r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_read FROM announcements a WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (a.valid_to IS NULL OR a.valid_to > NOW())
AND ( a.target_type LIKE '%ALL%' OR a.target_type LIKE '%STUDENT%' OR (a.target_type LIKE '%MAJOR%' AND a.target_value = #{userInfo}) )
AND ( a.target_type LIKE '%ALL%' OR a.target_type LIKE '%TEACHER%' OR (a.target_type LIKE '%TEACHER_TYPE%' AND a.target_value = #{userInfo}) )
ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC
